touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Chloe Ali. Left voicemail introducing platform capabilities for revenue operations automation. No callback received.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with case study on sales-to-CS handoff automation for healthcare IT companies. Chloe responded expressing interest in learning more about implementation timeline and team requirements.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for mid-market teams, including training and workflow configuration

next_steps: Schedule qualification call to discuss current process and pain points

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Chloe Ali to understand current sales-to-CS handoff process. PeakAI currently uses manual Slack notifications and spreadsheets, leading to 15-20% information loss during handoffs. Team of 18 across sales and CS experiencing growing pains as company scales.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest pain point in the current handoff process?
questions_asked.answer: Customer context gets lost between sales and CS, leading to poor onboarding experiences

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing Salesforce and Zendesk setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both platforms

next_steps: Chloe to document current workflow
Schedule discovery call to map detailed requirements

touches.ai_summary: Brief check-in call scheduled to confirm discovery meeting agenda. Chloe mentioned she's preparing workflow documentation and wants to include CS manager in next discussion.

questions_asked.question: Should I invite our CS manager to the discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, that would be very helpful to understand both sides of the handoff

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled with expanded team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call agenda and requesting specific workflow documentation. Shared preliminary resource guide on sales-to-CS automation best practices. Chloe confirmed attendance and shared current process diagram.
next_steps: Discovery call Tuesday at 2pm ET

touches.ai_summary: First discovery call with Chloe and CS manager. Reviewed current handoff process in detail - average 12 fields manually transferred, 3-4 day delay between deal close and CS kickoff, no standardized format. Discussed automation workflows and data mapping requirements.

questions_asked.question: What information is most critical to capture during handoff?
questions_asked.answer: Customer pain points, promised features, implementation timeline expectations, and key stakeholder contacts

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable through our workflow builder - you can map any Salesforce field to any Zendesk field and add conditional logic

next_steps: Rep to create custom workflow mockup
Chloe to identify key stakeholders for expanded demo

touches.ai_summary: Second discovery call focused on technical requirements and integration architecture. Discussed API limits, data sync frequency, and reporting capabilities. Chloe raised questions about implementation complexity and internal IT resource requirements.

questions_asked.question: Will we need dedicated IT resources for setup and maintenance?
questions_asked.answer: Setup is handled by our team, ongoing maintenance is minimal - typically 2-3 hours per month for workflow adjustments

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for implementing a solution?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within next quarter - our Q2 growth targets require better handoff efficiency

next_steps: Schedule demo with custom workflow examples
Share technical documentation with IT team

touches.ai_summary: Email sharing custom workflow mockup based on PeakAI's specific handoff requirements. Included ROI calculator estimating 25 hours saved per month and 40% reduction in customer onboarding time. Chloe responded positively and requested demo for executive team.

questions_asked.question: Can we get our COO Jessica Osei involved in the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - we can tailor the demo to show executive-level metrics and ROI

next_steps: Schedule demo with executive attendance

touches.ai_summary: Discovery wrap-up call to finalize demo requirements. Chloe outlined success criteria: reduce handoff time by 50%, eliminate data loss, improve CS team satisfaction. Discussed pricing tier options and seat requirements for 18-person team.

questions_asked.question: Beyond the 18 seats, do you anticipate team growth this year?
questions_asked.answer: We're planning to add 5-6 people in H2, but want to start with current team size

questions_asked.question: What's included in your unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited workflows, API calls, data storage, and automation runs - no usage-based fees

next_steps: Demo scheduled for next week
Prepare executive-focused presentation

touches.ai_summary: Demo with Chloe and extended team. Showcased custom workflow automation, real-time data sync, and reporting dashboard. Meeting rescheduled once due to scheduling conflict. Team engaged with questions about customization depth and edge case handling.

questions_asked.question: How does the platform handle partial data or incomplete deal records?
questions_asked.answer: We have validation rules and fallback workflows - you can set required fields and notification triggers for missing data

questions_asked.question: Can we test this with a subset of deals before full rollout?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we recommend a pilot phase - you can enable automation for specific deal types or team members

questions_asked.question: What was your reaction to the automated handoff workflow we showed?
questions_asked.answer: It's exactly what we need - the real-time sync would eliminate most of our current issues

objections: Need to validate that our custom Salesforce fields can be mapped properly
next_steps: Technical evaluation with IT team
Chloe to build internal business case

touches.ai_summary: Brief follow-up call after demo. Chloe mentioned positive internal feedback but needs to align on technical validation scope. Discussed timeline for technical evaluation phase.

questions_asked.question: How long do technical evaluations typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 1-2 weeks depending on IT team availability - we provide dedicated support throughout

next_steps: Schedule technical eval with IT team

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation call with Chloe and IT lead. Reviewed API documentation, security protocols, data privacy compliance, and integration architecture. Validated custom Salesforce field mapping capabilities. IT team expressed satisfaction with technical approach but requested additional security documentation.

questions_asked.question: What security certifications does your platform maintain?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliant, HIPAA-ready with BAA available

questions_asked.question: Are there any technical blockers we should address?
questions_asked.answer: No major blockers - just need to review your security documentation in detail

questions_asked.question: How do you handle PHI data given our healthcare customers?
questions_asked.answer: We have HIPAA-compliant infrastructure and can execute a BAA - healthcare is a key vertical for us

next_steps: Share security documentation and compliance certificates
Schedule follow-up demo for executives

touches.ai_summary: Executive demo with Chloe and Jessica Osei (COO). Focused on business outcomes: efficiency gains, revenue retention impact, and team productivity metrics. Jessica engaged with strategic questions about scalability and long-term roadmap. Demonstrated ROI model showing 8-month payback period.

questions_asked.question: How does this solution scale as we grow beyond 100 employees?
questions_asked.answer: Platform scales seamlessly - many enterprise customers run thousands of automation workflows without performance degradation

questions_asked.question: What does your product roadmap look like for the next 12 months?
questions_asked.answer: Focusing on AI-powered insights, expanded integration marketplace, and advanced analytics capabilities

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for PeakAI with this implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Reducing onboarding time by half, eliminating customer complaints about inconsistent handoffs, and freeing up RevOps time for strategic work

questions_asked.question: How hands-on is your customer success team during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Very hands-on - dedicated CSM, weekly check-ins during first month, and ongoing quarterly business reviews

objections: Need to understand total cost of ownership including implementation and training
next_steps: Prepare formal proposal with pricing
Chloe to coordinate budget approval process

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email thanking Jessica and Chloe for their time. Included executive summary deck with ROI analysis, customer references in healthcare IT space, and implementation timeline. Chloe responded that they're moving forward with budget approval and requested pricing options.
next_steps: Prepare pricing proposal for 18 seats unlimited automation tier

touches.ai_summary: Email with formal proposal including three pricing tiers. Recommended unlimited automation tier at $16,900 annual list price for 18 seats. Included payment terms options and implementation timeline. Chloe acknowledged receipt and mentioned she's working through budget approval process.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the pricing given our stage and commitment?
questions_asked.answer: Let's schedule a call to discuss your specific situation and budget constraints

next_steps: Schedule pricing discussion call

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call to discuss budget constraints. Meeting rescheduled once. Chloe mentioned budget approval for $12,000, significantly below list price. Discussed multi-year commitment and reduced scope options to bridge gap.

questions_asked.question: What's the minimum viable package that still solves our core handoff problem?
questions_asked.answer: The unlimited automation tier is really the right fit for your use case - let me see what we can do on pricing

objections: Budget approved is $12,000, need significant discount to move forward
next_steps: Explore pricing flexibility with sales leadership
Schedule proposal call to present adjusted options

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call presenting adjusted pricing options. Offered $11,200 ACV (33.7% discount) for 18 seats unlimited automation tier with annual prepay. Chloe receptive but wants to validate final pricing with Jessica before committing. Discussed implementation timeline and success metrics.

questions_asked.question: Does the $11,200 price point work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that fits our budget - I need to run it by Jessica for final sign-off

questions_asked.question: What does the implementation timeline look like if we sign this month?
questions_asked.answer: We can start within one week of signature, 2-3 week implementation, live by end of quarter

next_steps: Chloe to review pricing with Jessica
Prepare final contract documents

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize contract terms. Discussed payment terms (annual prepay vs quarterly), auto-renewal clauses, and seat expansion pricing. Chloe requested quarterly payment option and more flexible cancellation terms given budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual prepay at this price?
questions_asked.answer: The discounted pricing is contingent on annual prepay - quarterly would require a price adjustment

questions_asked.question: Is annual prepay a blocker for getting this approved?
questions_asked.answer: Not a blocker, but would make CFO approval easier - let me check what's possible

objections: Prefer quarterly payment terms for cash flow management
next_steps: Confirm final payment terms
Schedule call with Jessica for executive alignment

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call focused on payment terms negotiation. Agreed to annual prepay at $11,200 with standard cancellation terms (30-day notice at renewal). Discussed seat expansion pricing for anticipated H2 growth. Chloe confirmed this structure works for her budget approval.

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing if we need to add 5-6 seats in six months?
questions_asked.answer: Seats added mid-contract are prorated at the same per-seat rate, billed immediately

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on all commercial terms now?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, pending Jessica's final sign-off on the discount level

next_steps: Executive meeting with Jessica to finalize approval

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Jessica Osei to review business case and finalize approval. Jessica focused on ROI validation, implementation risk, and long-term value. Discussed success metrics and quarterly business review structure. Jessica expressed concern about discount depth but acknowledged solution fit.

questions_asked.question: What's your churn rate for customers at our size and industry?
questions_asked.answer: Mid-market healthcare IT customers have 94% retention rate - strong product-market fit in this segment

questions_asked.question: How do you ensure we actually achieve the ROI promised in your model?
questions_asked.answer: We establish baseline metrics before launch, track KPIs weekly during implementation, and conduct monthly ROI reviews in first quarter

questions_asked.question: What would give you confidence to approve this investment?
questions_asked.answer: I need to understand why we're getting such a significant discount - is this your standard pricing or are we getting a deal because of concerns about fit?

objections: Concerned that large discount indicates either pricing instability or questions about product value
next_steps: Address discount rationale
Schedule follow-up executive meeting

touches.ai_summary: Second executive meeting with Jessica to address discount concerns and finalize decision. Explained pricing flexibility based on annual prepay commitment, mid-market segment strategy, and Q1 quota timing. Jessica satisfied with explanation. Reviewed implementation plan, success criteria, and executive sponsor expectations. Jessica gave conditional approval pending legal review of contract terms.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we don't hit the ROI targets in first six months?
questions_asked.answer: We include an ROI guarantee - if you don't achieve 50% handoff time reduction by month 6, we'll extend support and provide additional consulting at no cost

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining concerns about moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: No concerns on the business case - just need legal to review data processing and liability terms

questions_asked.question: How involved will you need me to be during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Kickoff meeting, 30-day checkpoint, and go-live approval - roughly 3-4 hours total over the implementation period

questions_asked.question: What's your escalation path if things go wrong during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Direct line to our VP of Customer Success, plus I'm personally available for any executive concerns

next_steps: Legal review of contract
Chloe to coordinate internal sign-off process

Confirmed $11,200 ACV, 18 seats, unlimited automation tier, annual prepay. Contract ready for signature. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline.

questions_asked.question: Are we clear to send final contract for signature?
